visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a black baseball cap and a dark vest is kneeling on a stone-tiled outdoor square. He is using colored chalk to draw various national flags inside circular outlines on the pavement. Beside him, an older man with a denim jacket kneels and watches. In the background, there is a large, historic-looking grey stone building with numerous arched windows and a clock. (2) The camera moves closer to the ground, revealing a grid of circular flags including the Italian and Norwegian flags. The artist is seen meticulously coloring a green section of a flag. Several coins are placed on top of the completed drawings. Yellow and white variety text overlays appear on the screen. (3) A young man with a white headband and a light-grey patterned cardigan enters the frame. He speaks excitedly to the camera while pointing down at the street art. He wears a white cross-body bag. The background shows other pedestrians walking across the urban plaza. (4) A close-up shot focuses on the Taiwan flag drawn on the ground. A hand holding a brown wallet appears, and a 100 US dollar bill is carefully placed on the flag next to some coins. The man with the headband continues to gesture and speak with high energy, his facial expressions shifting from focused to wide-eyed excitement. (5) The man with the headband stands back and points at the flags on the ground, counting them one by one. The camera follows his finger as it moves across the rows of flags. He looks towards the camera, smiling and gesturing towards the stone building behind him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV: 當你看到外國人畫出台灣. [Subtitle]: 在挪威這邊有這個彩繪家. (2) [Subtitle]: 他畫了什麼. [Logo]: @yga0721. (3) [Subtitle]: 台灣. 是台灣欸!!. (4) [Subtitle]: 他真的很會欸. 在那邊然後地上畫這個各國的國旗. [Variety]: \ 這是我家 / \ 我捐款 /. (5) [Subtitle]: 就會放在自己的那個國家. 他各國都吃得到. 更厲害的是他 China Taiwan 都畫了. [Variety]: (厲害的生意人). (6) [Subtitle]: 這邊這個中國遊客很多啊. 這個不能輸的!!. [Variety]: (開始掏錢). (7) [Subtitle]: 美金 100 元!!. [Variety]: !!美金 100 元!!. (8) [Subtitle]: 不是... 冷靜冷靜. 美金 100 不能輸啦. [Variety]: 嘎哥的鈔能力. (9) [Subtitle]: 不猶豫放上 100 美金... [Variety]: (國際通用用語). (10) [Subtitle]: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9. 第九個就換到台灣了你看看. 10 11 12 13. [Variety]: (China 在後面).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator/speaker, 1 street artist, 1 kneeling observer, 4 passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man wearing a white headband, a light-grey patterned cardigan over a white t-shirt, dark trousers, and a white small cross-body bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A spacious stone-paved public square in front of a large, impressive 19th-century style grey stone building with a clock tower, likely a train station or government building. Bicycles are parked in the distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic male voice begins speaking rapidly over an upbeat electronic pop track with a steady drum beat. The speaker's tone is very excited and theatrical. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect triggers as the speaker shouts 'Taiwan!' with rising intonation. Background city hum is faintly present. (3) The speaker continues his fast-paced narration, his voice characterized by high pitch variability. The electronic music remains constant in the background. A brief female chuckle is audible in the distance. (4) As the video cuts to the wallet, the sound of crinkling paper and the rustling of a bill is captured over the music. The speaker reacts with a loud, surprised exclamation. (5) A series of rhythmic 'ding' sound effects occurs as the speaker counts upwards, coinciding with his gestures. The BGM maintains its tempo until the end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Observation -> Emotional Reaction -> Action -> Result
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video documents a traveler's encounter with a street artist in Norway and uses the occasion to showcase patriotic support for Taiwan through a significant donation, presented in a high-energy, vlog-style format typical of social media influencers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes fast editing and variety-show style text overlays to maintain high engagement. The choice of Bergen Railway Station as a backdrop adds architectural interest.
